# Explore the Future of AI with Allie K. Miller at Activate Summit 2025 - Iterable

## Explore the Future of AI with Allie K. Miller at Activate Summit 2025

**Published by**

February 13, 2025

![Allie K. Miller Keynote Announcement Activate 2025](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/allie-k-miller-e1739903264770.png)

AI is changing how we work, communicate, and connect with customers—and few people understand its impact better than **Allie K. Miller**.

We’re excited to welcome Allie—CEO of Open Machine, Fortune 500 AI Advisor, and former Global Head of Machine Learning for Startups and Venture Capital at AWS—as our keynote speaker at Activate Summit 2025. With nearly 2 million followers, she is also the most followed voice on AI business, and her groundbreaking insights on AI have been featured in Forbes, Fortune, Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, and more.

#### What to Expect

Allie is changing the game of AI. She’s spoken about it around the world, addressed the European Commission, drafted foreign AI strategies, and created eight guidebooks to educate businesses on how to build successful AI projects. Drawing from her experience advising the top machine learning researchers and founders in the world, she will discuss:

*   Current and future trends in artificial intelligence and machine learning
*   Ways in which these trends are transforming our everyday lives 
*   How AI serves as a catalyst for transformations in businesses across all sectors

#### Why This Matters

AI isn’t just about automation—it’s about enhancing decision-making, scaling personalization, and unlocking new possibilities. Allie’s deep experience advising business leaders and global organizations gives her a unique perspective on where AI is headed next. She has been at the forefront of AI innovation, recognized as one of Award Magazine’s Top 50 Women in Tech, Top 100 Global Thought Leaders, and Chief in Tech’s Top 100 Women in Tech to Watch in 2022. She is also ranked among Neptune’s Top 20 AI Influencers.

As AI continues to evolve, Allie’s industry-leading insights are key to helping marketers and business leaders thrive in this new landscape. This is a chance to hear from one of the most influential voices in AI—and to rethink how technology can shape the future of marketing. 

#### Join Us at Activate Summit 2025

Activate Summit is for anyone ready to lead the marketing revolution. Join us **April 1-3, 2025** in **San Jose, CA** to learn how top marketers blend AI with a personal touch to build and maintain genuine customer connectins. You’ll walk away with actionable insights and inspiration for creating more impactful, intelligent marketing.

**Secure your spot today!**
